sections.subtitle: Team Form Analysis
sections.text: Sevilla's recent form shows inconsistency with 1 win, 2 draws, and 2 losses in their last 5 matches, struggling to convert chances (missed big chances in recent games). Real Madrid, despite a strong season (2nd place with 78 points), have had mixed results recently with 3 wins, 1 draw, and 1 loss, but their attacking prowess remains evident with high shot volumes and Kylian Mbappé in top form (7 goals in last 5 matches).

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head History
sections.text: In the last 2 head-to-head encounters, Real Madrid dominated with a 4-2 and a 1-0 victory over Sevilla. Historical trends suggest high-scoring games (more than 2.5 goals in 6 of last 8 matches) and both teams scoring in most encounters (7 of last 8 matches).

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Sevilla (13th, 41 points) struggles defensively, conceding 49 goals this season, while their attack has been average (40 goals scored). Real Madrid (74 goals scored, 38 conceded) shows superior attacking and defensive stats, though missing key players like Vinícius Júnior could impact their performance.

sections.subtitle: Key Player Impact
sections.text: Sevilla's Dodi Lukebakio (11 goals) will be crucial for any upset, but their defense lacks solidity. Real Madrid's Kylian Mbappé (28 goals, league-leading) and Jude Bellingham (consistent performer in H2H) are likely to exploit Sevilla’s defensive weaknesses.

sections.subtitle: Match Context and Trends
sections.text: With Sevilla at home and Real Madrid missing several key players, the match might be closer than expected, but Madrid’s superior quality and attacking form should prevail. Trends indicate a high likelihood of cards (over 4.5 in 6/7 H2H) and moderate corner counts (less than 10.5 in 9/10 H2H).
